questions.question: What is the anti-pattern of using `watch` to derive a value that `computed` should handle?
options: It causes infinite loops in the reactivity system
It creates a manual synchronization point — a sync bug waiting to happen
It is a syntax error in Vue 3
It prevents the value from being reactive

questions.question: Why is an event bus considered an anti-pattern in Vue 3?
options: Event buses are too slow for production use
Vue 3 removed `$on`/`$off` — you must use a third-party lib
It creates invisible dependencies making it impossible to trace who emits and who listens
Event buses only work in Vue 2 with the Options API

questions.question: What is the recommended fix for `deep: true` watching a large object just to detect one property change?
options: Watch only the specific property with a getter: `() => obj.prop`
Use `watchEffect` which is more efficient for deep objects
Move the object to a Pinia store where deep watching is free
